requirement.title: REQ-0932
requirement.requirement: The driver would like to drive off fast: Until reaching the start end engine speed threshold, either (the upper clutch switch is active) resp. (the clutch pedal position sensor greater than threshold for clutch pedal active (calibr., 50 %) AND clutch pedal position sensor plausible) OR the gas pedal value greater than a calibratable minimum threshold (5%) AND
